summary: Mislabeled recording – actually a Henry Kaiser San Francisco show, not the advertised Grateful Dead Fillmore Denver performance.
review: The sole reviewer flags this entry as incorrectly labeled, stating it features Henry Kaiser in San Francisco rather than a Grateful Dead concert at the Fillmore in Denver. No details are provided about audio fidelity or musical performance of the Dead, so the recording cannot be evaluated on those criteria.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one negative review highlighting a mislabel; no useful information about show or recording quality for the Grateful Dead, resulting in a low rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes that the file is mislabeled and actually contains a Henry Kaiser performance; no comments on sound clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No valid Grateful Dead set to assess; reviewer indicates the recording is not the advertised concert.
